---
pagetitle: "Tools | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Three decision-support tools by Dr Mesfin Genie: eMANDEVAL for vaccine-mandate policy, a benefit-cost tool for agricultural trials, and STEPS for field-epidemiology training."
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell">
<p class="eyebrow">Tools</p>
<h1>Decision-support tools</h1>
<p class="section-lead">Interactive tools that turn preference and economic evidence into analysis decision-makers can use directly. Each tool page explains the problem, the users, the inputs and outputs, and the method.</p>
</div></header>

<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow">
<div class="tool-list">
<article class="tool-row"><h2><a href="/tools/emandeval/">eMANDEVAL Future</a></h2><p>Compares vaccine-mandate designs by predicted public support and outcomes. For public-health policymakers and researchers.</p></article>
<article class="tool-row"><h2><a href="/tools/soil-crc-bca/">SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool</a></h2><p>Net present value, benefit-cost ratio, and sensitivity analysis for agricultural trials. For researchers and partners evaluating production trials.</p></article>
<article class="tool-row"><h2><a href="/tools/steps/">STEPS FETP Scale-up Decision Aid</a></h2><p>Endorsement, value, and costs for scaling field-epidemiology training. For planners and partners of FETP scale-up in India.</p></article>
</div>
</div></section>
```
